examples: I confess I became a courtesan.
Her most recent book is a novel, "the Courtesan and the Samurai."
Thinkers and poets throughout the ages have offered the courtesan the oblation of their mercy.
He knew Prince Henry of Prussia had visited the Club three years earlier and sipped champagne from a courtesan's shoe.
The new, glossy Umrao Jaan is a retread of the critically acclaimed 1981 commercial hit about a 19th century north Indian courtesan.
